JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Heritage for the Future
Twitter-Lead TO: I dont have any that are public
Rules-Chara Change: Winner must keep character. Loser may switch.
Rules-Glitches:
- Avdol Ankh Glitch aka Avdol Ghosting Glitch is banned.
- Game crashing ou softlocking glitches are banned (Iggy/Jotaro softlock grab glitch, etc. Any glitch that makes the game unplayable is banned).
- Any other glitch is allowed if it don't make the game unplayable or frozen/stuck.
Finals-Games per Set: 3/5 Games for Losers Finals, 3/5 Games for Winners Finals, 3/5 Games for Grand Finals
Rules-Notes:
- Petshop e Kakyoin are softbanned. If one of the players chooses, they can ask the Kak or Petshop player to switch characters.

- Loops are restricted to 3 repetitions.
Exemplo: (S.Dio Loop, DIO Loop etc).
 
- 1 Tandem per combo. 2 Tandems are allowed if the first one is made before a stand crash is done in the combo.
(ABCx5 > Stand crash in the first "ABC" repetitions > the rest of the hits of the same tandem > another tandem is NOT allowed)

- UB oki of VIce is banned, tandem UB on okizeme is banned.

- Debug Mode is banned, restart or close the game to avoid playing it.
$-Pot Split Further: If the pot reaches 50$, split it to 50/25/15/10.

-Avdol Ankh AKA Avdol ghosting glitch is banned
-Debug/Dev mode are banned

Rules-Notes:
-Kakyoin and Petshop are still banned
-The Gray Fly Stage “Plane Stage” is soft banned (The right corner of the stage is blocked by a sprite and can cause issues). If both players agree to reset, resetting will serve no penalty. (Characters that can trigger this stage: Kakyoin, Oldseph, Devo, Jotaro, Alessi, Midler, Avdol)
-Vice unblockable oki is banned
-Loops are limited to 3 repetitions. (S.Dio Loop, DIO Loop, custom combo, etc.)
-1 Tandem per combo. 2 Tandems allowed if the first causes a stand crash and ends right after. 
(ABCx5 > Stand crash on first repetition > rest of the tandem repetitions > into another tandem NOT allowed)

Info-Software Needed:
Squiroll version 1.4 or higher (https://github.com/Dazegambler/squiroll/releases/latest); Radmin for connections that can't work with Squiroll (https://www.radmin-vpn.com/).

Setting Squiroll: Download "stable" version and extract it into your game's folder (th115r, Netcode.dll and th155 need to be in the same folder with everything else in it), run th155r and you should see "squiroll version 1.4" on the top bar and on your main menu. If at any point something breaks or doesn't download, disable antivirus on your browser and windows defender to allow it to get downloaded/ use it on your pc.
